passives.desc: Gain Speed equal to the generated 'Barbed Lasso' Unit on the field
passives.name: Bramble Steed

passives.desc:
At 40%- HP, gain a new pattern
Every turn, inflict [Burst] equal to each enemy's Speed against each enemy
Inflict 2 [ThornNoose] instead
Gain 2 [AttackUp] and [DefenseDown] with every passing turn (max 12)
passives.name: Interlocking Brambles

passives.desc:
If the target has [Burst] immediately before attack, 20% chance to inflict +1 [Burst] Count
When inflicting [ThornNoose], generate a 'Barbed Lasso' Unit.
passives.name: Spiked Whip

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If target has less than 5 [Burst] Count, inflict +2 [Burst] Count
- At 5+ [Burst] Count, inflict 2 [Burst] instead

[OnSucceedAttack] If target has less than 5 [Burst] Count, inflict +2 [Burst] Count
- At 5+ [Burst] Count, inflict 2 [Burst] instead

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Burst], Coin Power +1
[WinDuel] Inflict +2 [Burst] Count
skills.name: Whip Crack

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal 10 SP damage
- If target has 0- SP, deal 20 SP damage instead

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with the lowest SP
[WhenUse] If target has 0- SP, Clash Power +3
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 4 [Burst] on the target (max 3)
skills.name: Strangling Crown of Thorns

descs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If the target has [ThornNoose], inflict 2 [Burst]
- If the target has 10+ [Burst], inflict +2 [Burst] Count instead

[OnSucceedAttack] If the target has [ThornNoose], inflict 2 [Burst]
- If the target has 10+ [Burst], inflict +2 [Burst] Count instead

[OnSucceedAttack] If the target has [ThornNoose], inflict 2 [Burst]
- If the target has 10+ [Burst], inflict +2 [Burst] Count instead

skills.desc:
Prioritizes targets with [ThornNoose]
If the target does not have [ThornNoose], deal -50% damage
skills.name: Withdraw Whip

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target is Staggered or has [ThornNoose], deal +30% damage
[EnemyKill] Inflict ([Burst] Count on the target x 2) [Burst] against all enemies (max 10)

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's, Clash Power +5
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 4 [Burst] on the target (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain Base Power by the number of targets with [ThornNoose]
skills.name: Barbed Lasso

skills.desc: [StartBattle] Gain (number of enemies with [ThornNoose])% of HP as Shield
skills.name: Whip Wreath

skills.desc: [StartBattle] If there are 3- enemies with [ThornNoose], inflict 1 [ThornNoose]
skills.name: Snaring Lasso

passives.desc: When this unit dies, the [ThornNoose] of the enemy bound to this unit expires
passives.name: Barbed Lasso
